typeScriptProvenance.note: React 19.2.7 does not ship bundled TypeScript declaration files. React's official TypeScript guide directs users to @types/react and @types/react-dom; this report extracts symbols from @types/react and links back to official React documentation where possible.

packages.name: @types/react
packages.role: React-recommended TypeScript declarations used for this report

results.note: Audit anchor from VIR event resources to React's synthetic event base surface.

tsSymbol.display: interface SyntheticEvent<T = Element, E = Event> extends BaseSyntheticEvent<E, EventTarget & T, EventTarget> {}
tsSymbol.hover:
currentTarget - a reference to the element on which the event listener is registered.

target - a reference to the element from which the event was originally dispatched.
This might be a child element to the element on which the event listener is registered.
If you thought this should be `EventTarget & T`, see https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/issues/11508#issuecomment-256045682
